params.name: Boltzmann Brain
params.source: Fragment Crafting (17.8%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Master Scrolls (6.5%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), TECH Master Scrolls  (31.5%), Wishing (0.65%)
params.description: On Aug 4, 1990, Boltzmann Brain was exposed for the first time. If the known universe comes from fluctuations in entropy, then there should be a universe where there's full of consciousnesses in the fluctuation, such as a lonely brain, too. Someone once pondered: imagine there is a ghoul. It creates an illusion for you so you see and feel a complete outside world and yourself as a complete human being that doesn't even exist. So, do feelings equal existence? To answer this question, try to learn …
